meta.title: WealthQuant - Quantitative Investment Platform
meta.description: AI-powered quantitative investment solutions for real estate, stocks, and collectibles

hero.description: Leverage the power of artificial intelligence and big data analytics to make smarter investment decisions across real estate, stocks, and collectibles.

mission.statement: What Matters to You, Matters to Us
mission.subtitle: We're on a mission to make investing fair for everyone
mission.description: By automating good advice, we're able to help more people achieve wealth growth through intelligent investment strategies.
mission.aiDescription: Our AI helps your advisor identify ways for you to get a higher return while taking lower risk.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive quantitative investment solutions powered by AI

houseQuant.name: HouseQuant
houseQuant.description: We're bringing the quantitative revolution to real estate investing. Property investing today is often based on incomplete and inadequate information. Analysis, forecasts, and decisions are not rigorously produced, and are sometimes driven by emotion, untested assumptions, and rules of thumb. Portfolio considerations in real estate are often ignored. We work to improve real estate decision making. It can and should be evidence-based, data-driven, and systematic instead. We are leading the way forward by applying quantitative finance and data science methods to global real estate, helping investors beat the market.

stockQuant.name: StockQuant
stockQuant.description: Committed to providing a full range of growth stock analysis and interpretation, with performance exceeds expectations and technical analysis in one accurate stock selection, market trend tracking and position dynamic management in one to control risk, quantitative automatic trading and instruction-based trigger in one to avoid psychological impact, to obtain excessive returns!
features: Maximize Your Returns With Power of AI
Automate Your Trading To Make Best Use of Time And Capital

collectibleQuant.name: CollectibleQuant
collectibleQuant.description: Folk ancient artworks are the most representative markers and carriers of Chinese culture and dissemination. With the help of artificial intelligence, blockchain, IoTs and other technologies, CollectibleQuant is committed to providing comprehensive scientific digital twin, collection tracing, collection identification and valuation quantification.

researchDriven.title: Research-Driven
researchDriven.description: Our method is grounded in fundamental finance principles, rigorous quantitative research with tested models and strategies.

aiBigData.title: AI & Big Data
aiBigData.description: Close to 10 years of experience developing big data, NLP and machine learning at Google, Microsoft and Baidu.

engineering.title: World-class Engineering
engineering.description: Decades of combined engineering know-how, developing platforms at the scale of billions of queries per day.

about.title: Who We Are
about.description: WealthQuant was founded in the middle of 2021 and the founding team used to work at Baidu, Alibaba and financial firms with a proven track record of building many mission-critical machine learning systems where billions of data points were processed in real-time to predict the best outcome for core search ranking, ads monetization, recommendations, and trading platforms. Our mission is to build machine investing solutions to find alpha with adaptive learning algorithms and to create an edge by assimilating vast quantities of complex data through the latest AI methods to generate signals to uncover hidden, dynamic, and nonlinear patterns in the financial markets, especially in real estate, stock market and collectible investment.

backgrounds.desc1: There are a lot of people and companies that claim to do the right thing when it comes to your finances.
backgrounds.desc2: Unfortunately, that's not what most of us are feeling.
